theme: ULTRA ULTRA MODERN - Dark Mode Only

typography.anti_pattern: Do NOT use Inter, Roboto, or generic sans for headings. Avoid boring standard fonts. Use Unbounded for a bold, Gen-Z, disruptive feel.

colors.rules: Never use pure #000000; base is #050505. Accents must be highly vibrant. Use gradients sparingly—mostly for active buttons, live rings, or text masks (e.g., bg-clip-text).

glassmorphism.name: The Crystal Glass
glassmorphism.usage: Use for Modals, Dropdowns, Floating Navs, Sticky Headers. CRITICAL: Never use pure transparent without blur if there is text over video/content.

tracing_beam.name: Linear Glow
tracing_beam.usage: Use for Go Live Studio inputs, Premium Cards, and Wallet Modals to signal high-tech.
tracing_beam.implementation: 1px animated border gradient via Framer Motion or background gradient mask.

overlays.video_bottom: bg-gradient-to-t from-black/90 via-black/40 to-transparent (Required over full-screen videos for text readability).

dropdowns_and_selects.critical_fix: Native `<select>` with white backgrounds are BANNED.
dropdowns_and_selects.implementation: Build custom dropdowns using framer-motion or HeadlessUI/Radix UI. Container must use The Crystal Glass styling (bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/15). Dropdown options should hover with bg-white/10. Rounded corners must be perfectly matching the input (e.g. rounded-xl).

buttons.primary: Pill-shaped (rounded-full) or sharp with subtle rounding (rounded-xl). Background: linear gradient of Pink to Purple or solid Pink. Text: bold, white.
buttons.secondary: Glassmorphism button (bg-white/5 border border-white/10 text-white hover:bg-white/10).
buttons.interactions: MUST include hover:scale-105 active:scale-95. Transition transform 0.2s ease.

inputs.styling: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-white placeholder:text-white/30 focus:border-cyan focus:bg-white/10 outline-none transition-all.

cards.styling: bg-[#0a0a0a] border border-white/5 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden hover:border-white/15 transition-colors.

grids_and_layouts.feed_page: Edge-to-edge vertical swipe layout (100dvh). No scrolling bars. Absolute positioning for Right Side Actions (Heart, Comment, Share) and Bottom Info (Username, Caption, Music).
grids_and_layouts.profile_page: High density grid for video thumbnails (grid-cols-3 gap-1). User header must have centered avatar, stats in a flex row, and bio.
grids_and_layouts.discover_page: Bento Grid protocol (Tetris mode) for trending hashtags and categories. Mix wide, square, and tall cards. gap-4.
grids_and_layouts.live_studio: Split layout. Left: Video preview (large). Right: Controls, Dropdowns (Category), and Stream key. High-density, command-center look (The Performance Pro vibe).

motion.page_transitions: initial={{opacity: 0, y: 10}} animate={{opacity: 1, y: 0}} exit={{opacity: 0, y: -10}} transition={{duration: 0.3}}

micro_interactions.buttons: scale up on hover (1.05), scale down on active (0.95)
micro_interactions.like_heart: rapid spring scale up + fade out (TikTok style double tap)
micro_interactions.gifts: Framer motion path animations flying across the screen with glow filters

motion.rules: Avoid 'transition-all', specify properties like 'transition-transform, transition-colors, transition-opacity'.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure white text over videos has a text-shadow (e.g. drop-shadow-md or drop-shadow-[0_2px_4px_rgba(0,0,0,0.8)]).
accessibility.test_attributes: Add data-testid to ALL interactive elements (e.g. data-testid="live-category-dropdown", data-testid="like-button").
accessibility.focus: All focus states must be highly visible (e.g., focus:ring-2 focus:ring-pink-500).

media.images: Avatars must be rounded-full with border-2 border-transparent hover:border-pink-500. Thumbnails must have aspect-[9/16] or aspect-video.
media.videos: Must cover object-cover and snap to container.

image_urls.description: Cyberpunk neon portrait, woman with blue light
Woman standing in front of colorful display

instructions_to_main_agent: AUDIT ALL NATIVE <select> tags, especially in Go Live Studio. Replace them IMMEDIATELY with a custom React dropdown built with standard <div> elements, absolute positioning, Framer Motion, and heavy glassmorphism (bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-2xl border-white/20). NO MORE WHITE DROPDOWNS.
Implement the 'Crystal Glass' effect heavily across all overlays, sidebars, header, bottom nav, and modals.
Add 'Unbounded' and 'Outfit' to Google Fonts link in index.html, then set them up in tailwind.config.js.
Ensure the wallet, gifts panel, and auth modal feel extremely premium with glass, subtle glow shadows, and entrance animations.
Replace ALL instances of standard scrollbars with custom hidden or sleek styled scrollbars.
Feed Page must have proper text-shadow on text overlapping video, and a gradient overlay from bottom to top so UI is always legible regardless of the video content.
Make sure spacing is generous (p-6, p-8) inside modals and panels to prevent a cluttered look.
Gifts animations should fly out (use Framer motion).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use sonner for toasts. Sonner component are located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx.
